chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Constitution Petition No. S-142 of 2025 DATE OF HEARING ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For Orders on office objection. 2. For hearing of main case. O R D E R. 07-07-2025. Mr. Agha Athar Hussain, Assistant AAG, Sindh along with ASI Zamir Hussain. _____*******______ None present for the petitioner. Notice issued to respondents returned served upon respondent No. 15. Mr. Zahid Hussain Keerio advocate files power on behalf of respondent No. 15, which is taken on record and he further states that neither they have harassed the petitioner nor intent to do so in future. Learned Assistant A.G states that official respondents are legally bound to act strictly in accordance with law and provide protection to the petitioner if and when he approaches them. Order accordingly. In view of above, instant petition stands disposed of. J U D G E Nasim/P.A
